scripts.build: node scripts/setup-prisma-env.js && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @vetclinic/api build && pnpm --filter vetclinic/web build
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/setup-prisma-env.js && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @vetclinic/api build && pnpm --filter vetclinic/web build
scripts.build:render: node scripts/setup-prisma-env.js && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @vetclinic/api build && pnpm --filter vetclinic/web build
